findings.message: Concurrent BuildIndex calls can race and duplicate expensive index construction for the same cache key
findings.suggestion: Add a check-lock-check pattern or use sync.Once/singleflight to prevent duplicate index building when multiple goroutines request the same key simultaneously

findings.message: Init() is called synchronously during NewResourceServer construction, which may block server startup if index building takes significant time
findings.suggestion: Consider moving Init() to a separate Start() method or making it asynchronous with proper health checks to avoid blocking the constructor
